item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.title: Recycling Bin Dump
item.description:
#memes #dump #recycling #recycling_bin NOW WITH COMMENTARY!!! #recyclingbin
Hell yeah smoke with Char! [eans over to my friend] you don’t know him but he’s my childhood hero. An ace pilot. Look at Amuro lurking in the background, looking to smoke but too timid to ask… chump
It’s possible that they carved the mammoth whole looking at it.
Practically perfect in every way.
Who knew? We just needed to blow on the cartridge.
Can I get some water to wash this down?
I finally got one out and it still had blood in it!
Ooooh… it’s what you do to meeeeee~~~
Oh it’s what you do to meeee~~~
That look of relief the possum has when nobody is paying attention to him because they’re all focused on the camera… I feel that look in my soul.
Ha. Quantum humor
Maybe a woman screaming in the background? For dramatic effect.
The elves really could use a union rep but he’s buried under 12 feet of ice.
This is the kind of girl power/solidarity I can get behind.
I agree with Dr. Jones.
Yeah, fuck that. Fuck that right in the ear.
How about now? Is now okay? How about… now? Now?
Sadly yes. We’ll never reach phase 1 at this point.
No regrets behind them eyes.
It’s that look of disgust mixed with “wtf?!?!” That makes this picture for me.
It’s a balancing act between public embarrassment/shame versus getting your back blown out.
The pornograph drones on and on…
Yeah. That’s why I’m torn about the issue of abortion. I’m for it because it kills babies but I’m against it because it gives women a choice.
Was that too dark too fast?
Glorious vibes all the way. Rock bottom ain’t walking her dog anywhere.
A rock? A rock worked okay the first time. Innat what he used?
A bread poem, boning poem(bow chika wow wow), paring poem, kitchen poem, santoku poem…
And they’re like, “this sucks” damn right, this sucks. I can teach you, but you’re not interested
You guys have batteries?
It’s a very delicate scale. Balanced on a knife’s edge
“Gentle” reminder
Come on in! The water’s fine!!!
I’d buy it. Especially if the driver was trapped inside, trying to unlock good car with an iPad. With growing panic, he starts smashing the window with the iPad. #
Then you end up where you end up, predestined to find John Calvin
“Do a nose grind next!”
Why did this sur sur sur surprise anyone alone these days?
Yep
You DID NOT SEE ANYTHING. SHUT YOUR MOUTH AND WALK AWAY
Reindeer mount included
Moon gates
Fuck yeah
He looks cool as fuck. I’d totally want to be his friend. Have a beer with him, listen to him talk about how his shift manager is a cunt that needs to be taught a lesson in life.
Cat tax: Of course Mona. Always Mona.

item.title: Christmas Selfie
item.description: I have a few friends (and former friends) IRL that post to Imgur I see their content every now and then but no one knows I have an account. I can just browse memes and relax on here. I hope you all had a nice Christmas though. Have a Cat Tax on me.
item.dc:creator: PlaceHolderTitle

item.title: Zoooooooooidberg
item.dc:creator: subjectiveclock

item.title: Transition Timeline (Now With Bonus Memes)
item.description: The last few years have been a hell of a trip, but this one stands apart. Started out at any incredibly low, heartbroken place, made it through 3 major surgeries, and now I’m happier than I’ve been in…maybe ever. Can’t wait for what comes next. (Now please enjoy some random memes)
item.dc:creator: vhskitten

item.title: Fuck you universe. I win
item.dc:creator: JustAnotherVetOIF

item.title: Selfie game: Find the real me.
item.description:
Am I one of these dashing gentlemen?
How about one of these unlikely companions?
Speaking of companions...
If this is me, then I am a gift (my brother said so).
Not me. RIP Ron. Thanks for always reminding us destinations don't matter, "how you get there is the worthier part."
If you think this is me I think you have part of your brain missing.
If you're still wondering which it was, the username should help. Merry Christmas! Keep flying!
item.dc:creator: BrownestofCoats

item.title: Happy xmas from Glasgow, Scotland
item.description: Just a 49 year and 364 day old that took more joy in getting a Ken oodie than reasonably expected. I hope your day was full of joy and if it wasn't, tomorrow's not far round the corner. EDIT: For those asking, the hoodie is from Primark in the UK. It's kinda hard to get hold of, but persevere! And thanks for the small boardgame library compliments!

item.description: I've always been more of a lurker, but thought I'd take advantage of selfie day to share our twin boys that were born this past week! #selfie_day #christmas_selfie

item.dc:creator: Anderduds

item.title: Unattractive Male Christmas Selfie
item.description: I apologize but all these selfies people are posting are attractive. We needed some unattractive to balance the scales a bit. I mean, have you seen these selfies? Women, attractive. Men, attractive. Trans, attractive. Non-Binary, attractive. Straight, attractive. LGBTQ+, attractive. Dogs, attractive. Cats, attractive. Chest cut open in the middle of surgery, attractive. Upside down, attractive. You: always attractive. Front Page Edit: hug someone that you find beautiful, however you may find them beautiful.
item.dc:creator: Uprightcerebralyacht

item.title: Merry Christmas, Imgur!
item.description: Hope everyone’s having a good whatever they celebrate! It was so warm in Florida today we had to turn the AC on >.< #christmas_selfie #christmas #selfie_day

item.dc:creator: MentalistApprentice

item.title: Disappointing
item.description: What makes me more disappointed is that my better didn't let me or my mom know. Kinda not surprised at that point, but still disappointed. I've been spending less time with them because of this type of bull. What's worse is that his wife's mom who was attending is gravely ill, has maybe true years left if all fires well. My dad also has life threatening medical conditions right now and my better didn't let him know either. Had to find out third party. My parents are conservative and anti-vax, but after several deaths of friends and family, as well as others with long term health issues from it, have come to understand that COVID, and other colds & flu in general, are serious business for older folks.
item.dc:creator: MAN9000

item.title: Ukraine destroys russian warship in Black Sea
item.description: Sauce: https://www.bbc.com/news/world-europe-67821515 Looks like they used an airstrike to get at the Novocherkassk a second time, and this time for good. This gives us an interesting insight in the lack of russian air defence at the same time. There are some reports that the ship was used to import drones from Iran, but I could not find a confirmed source for that. Here is another post on this, from @michaelpencil https://imgur.com/t/current_events/zgpaL9F
item.dc:creator: Sebastopol

item.title: First post on Imgur! Merry Christmas everyone!!!
item.description: Sneaking out to a yoga class, and later I’ll be scrolling here. Both newfound ways to unwind from holiday craziness, and I’m grateful for them:) #selfie_day
item.dc:creator: mehismyname

item.title: Merry Christmas! Here’s a selfie and a handful of stolen memes!
item.dc:creator: AndaOop

item.title: What about second Chinese dinner for Christmas?
item.description:
How do people take selfies? This is a skill I have not developed.
Already been to dim sum, and now I'm heading out to Chinese buffet for dinner. Life is good today. My twin sister got us matching Totoro sweaters! They're going to have to pry this out of my cold dead hands.
There's a murder of 40-50 crows hanging out in the three trees closest to my house and making a lot of noise. Am I in a Hitchcock movie? Hopefully not. #totoro #chinesefood #crows
item.dc:creator: gianisa
